events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing load reactor on long motor leads creates a reflected-wave overvoltage condition at the motor terminals (impedance mismatch between VFD output cable and motor), which stresses winding insulation and raises bearing EDM current risk — a known, OEM-documented failure mode for long unmitigated lead runs. Marked `fail` (non-compliant with manufacturer cable-length/reactor requirements under NEC 110.3(B)), risk `high`, conditions `non-compliant` + `degraded`, with corrective actions (install correctly sized reactor/filter, verify cable length against OEM tables, megger test windings, check fault logs, inspect bearings).
